title: Border (small)
text: Border (small) Determines whether a thin border is displayed around the entity at runtime. Technical Name: U_BORDER Expected Value: N (No) | Y (Yes) Default Value: N (No) Value Description N (No) No border is displayed (Default). Y (Yes) A rectangular border is displayed around the entity's outer edge at runtime. This can change the frame positioning. Applies to: Entity Related Links BorderType The BorderType property is used to display a flat or grooved border around an area frame, grid, or the default entity widget. Border This property determines whether a border is displayed around the area frame, entity or occurrence frame, or field. It is set from the context menu in the form canvas. Was this topic helpful?
